description:
ElevenLabs: https://elevenlabs.io/agents?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=influencer&utm_campaign=influencer_-_nate_herk&utm_content=build_voice_agents_with_claude_code
Full courses + unlimited support: https://www.skool.com/ai-automation-society-plus/about?el=elevenlabs-claude-code
All my FREE resources: https://www.skool.com/ai-automation-society/about?el=elevenlabs-claude-code
Apply for my YT podcast: https://podcast.nateherk.com/apply
Work with me: https://uppitai.com/

My Tools💻
FREE MONTH voice to text: https://get.glaido.com/nate
Code NATEHERK for 10% off VPS (annual plan): https://www.hostinger.com/vps/claude-code-hosting

Voice agents used to mean clicking through ElevenLabs dashboards and wiring up API endpoints by hand. 

In this one I built a working voice agent for a website that captures leads and books discovery calls through cal.com, all by describing it in plain English to Claude Code. You'll see the full build, the bugs I hit along the way, and how I debugged them without ever touching the docs.

Sponsorship Inquiries:
📧 nate@smoothmedia.co

Connect with me:
https://www.linkedin.com/in/nateherkelman/
https://x.com/nateherk
https://www.instagram.com/nateherk/

TIMESTAMPS 
0:00 Intro & Demo
3:00 How Voice Agents Work
5:42 Three Ways to Deploy
6:43 Setting Up Claude Code
8:14 Plan Mode Build
14:03 Adding API Keys
17:11 First Test & Iteration
22:50 Debugging the Time Zone Bug
26:55 Final Booking Demo
29:14 Security & Cost
31:34 Final Thoughts
fulltitle: Building Realistic Voice Agents Has Never Been Easier
